visual_description: In a conference room with glass walls, a group of men in police uniforms sit around a dark table, while one man in a white shirt stands at the head with his arms crossed. The seated men are focused on papers and mugs on the table, with one man writing and another looking toward the standing man. A television screen and a staircase are visible in the background, and a police cap rests on the table.
